rationale.R1.4: The revised abstract/intro effectively maps against the nearest 3-5 works, identifying sharp vs rhetorical delta.
rationale.R1.7: The text engages with citation-level precision, auditing every load-bearing citation and flagging missing key works.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty is disclosed for each recommendation, marking confidence and missing evidence.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d), with no substantial drift.
rationale.RX.4: While the output is harm-free, there are minor regressions in certain regimes (time-dependent or strongly nonlinear problems).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, demonstrating provenance and traceability.
